title: After the Tenno Sho (Autumn): Leap of Faith!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sparing not even an ounce of effort when she
runs, Sweep Tosho successfully casts her magic on
Kawakami Princess and the others. Under her
spell, they find themselves desperate to win.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Overcome with emotion from the magic she's
witnessed, Kawakami Princess and Sweep Tosho's
peer both jump the fence and run onto the turf.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Neither of them want to give up on their dream.
They both want to win!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sweep Tosho suggests that they all compete
against one another, and they agree on the
Queen Elizabeth II Cup as the stage for their
bout. There, she hopes to see the effects of her
spell.
